_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for a chloroplast (Class 11 Cell: Unit of Life / pairs with Photosynthesis chapter). Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Outer membrane
hotspots.detail: The smooth outer boundary of the chloroplast's double-membrane envelope.

hotspots.label: Inner membrane
hotspots.detail: The inner layer of the envelope, controlling what enters and leaves the chloroplast.

hotspots.label: Stroma
hotspots.detail: The fluid matrix surrounding the grana, where the dark reactions of photosynthesis occur.

hotspots.label: Grana
hotspots.detail: Stacks of thylakoid discs where the light reactions of photosynthesis take place.

hotspots.label: Thylakoid
hotspots.detail: A single flattened membrane sac within a granum; contains chlorophyll for light absorption.

hotspots.label: Stroma lamellae
hotspots.detail: Membranous channels connecting neighbouring grana stacks.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational biology illustration of a chloroplast, shown as a cutaway cross-section revealing its internal structure. Show these structures clearly separated and individually distinguishable: outer membrane, inner membrane, stroma, grana (stacks of thylakoids), an individual thylakoid, and stroma lamellae connecting grana. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, a muted green palette. Calm and flat: no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow, no 3D-render sheen. Composition: a single oval chloroplast, centered and filling the frame, generous even margins. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. Absolutely no text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark -- the illustration only. Landscape 4:3, high resolution.
